allow: PowerShell($tmp = "$env:TEMP\\impeccable-install"; if \(Test-Path $tmp\) { Remove-Item -Recurse -Force $tmp }; git clone --depth=1 https://github.com/pbakaus/impeccable.git $tmp 2>&1 | Out-String)

PowerShell($target = "$env:USERPROFILE\\.claude\\skills"; if \(-not \(Test-Path $target\)\) { New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force $target | Out-Null }; if \(Test-Path "$target\\impeccable"\) { Remove-Item -Recurse -Force "$target\\impeccable" }; Copy-Item -Recurse "$env:TEMP\\impeccable-install\\.claude\\skills\\impeccable" $target; "Copied to: $target\\impeccable")

PowerShell($base = "$env:USERPROFILE\\.claude\\skills\\impeccable"; "SKILL.md exists: $\(Test-Path "$base\\SKILL.md"\)"; "reference files: $\(\(Get-ChildItem "$base\\reference" -File\).Count\)"; "scripts files: $\(\(Get-ChildItem "$base\\scripts" -File\).Count\)"; "scripts subdirs: $\(\(Get-ChildItem "$base\\scripts" -Directory\).Count\)"; "Total size: $\('{0:N1} MB' -f \(\(Get-ChildItem $base -Recurse -File | Measure-Object Length -Sum\).Sum / 1MB\)\)")
